zh.lifeSummary: 當Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont於1217年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯阿普雷蒙特時，他的父親Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont29歲，母親Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy22歲。他和Agnès de Coucy-Vervins至少有3個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1279年享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: Gobert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: VII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont was born in 1217, in Apremont, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont, was 29 and his mother, Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy, was 22. He had at least 3 sons and 5 daughters with Agnès de Coucy-Vervins. He died in 1279, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont est né en 1217, à Apremont, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles avec Agnès de Coucy-Vervins. Il est décédé en 1279, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont 1217 in Apremont, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont 29 und seine Mutter Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy 22. Er hatte mit Agnès de Coucy-Vervins mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1279 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont è nato il nel 1217 nel Apremont, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie con Agnès de Coucy-Vervins. Morì nel 1279, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremontが1217年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスアプレモントで生まれた時，父Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremontは29歳，母Julienne de Chaumont Rosoyは22歳であった。彼はAgnès de Coucy-Vervinsとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1279年に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont(이)가 1217년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 에프렘트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Agnès de Coucy-Vervins(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1279년 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont nasceu em 1217, em Apremont, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas com Agnès de Coucy-Vervins. Ele faleceu em 1279, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont родился в 1217 г. в местности апремонт, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy, 22. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей от Agnès de Coucy-Vervins. Он умер в 1279 г. в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gobert VII d’Aspremont, Seigneur d’Aspremont nació en 1217, en Apremont, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Gobert VI le Bienheureux d'Aspremont, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Julienne de Chaumont Rosoy, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas con Agnès de Coucy-Vervins. Murió en 1279, a la edad de 62 años.
